vBRIEFInfo.description: Story vBRIEF for #1595 closeout and tracker reconciliation after #1871 merged.

plan.title: docs: reconcile codebase MAP rollout closeout

narratives.Description: #1871 merged the PR6 consumer and agent guidance propagation for #1595. The project source still describes consumer propagation as future work, and the related trackers still need an explicit closeout boundary so #1498 can continue with brownfield/spec work without reopening the completed MAP series.
narratives.ImplementationPlan: 1. Update PROJECT-DEFINITION and specification source text so the codebase MAP series is no longer described as waiting on consumer propagation. 2. Refresh generated projections that derive from those vBRIEF sources. 3. Clarify docs that generated headers remain a split optional follow-up and local indexes/materialized views belong to #1618, not #1595. 4. Post tracker closeout comments for #1595 and #958 with references to the merged PR sequence and remaining follow-up trackers. 5. Run focused content, vBRIEF, codeStructure, and MAP freshness validation.
narratives.UserStory: As a maintainer closing the #1595 series, I want source text, docs, and tracker comments to agree on what shipped and what moved elsewhere, so future work starts from the current state instead of stale PR4-era notes.
narratives.Acceptance: #1595 is represented as complete through PR1, PR2, PR3, PR4, and PR6. PROJECT-DEFINITION, specification source, and any generated projections no longer say consumer propagation is pending. Docs preserve the source-of-truth boundary: codeStructure remains canonical in PROJECT-DEFINITION, MAP is generated, generated headers are split follow-up work, local indexes/materialized views are tracked by #1618, brownfield/spec reconstruction stays with #1589, glossary/comment convention stays with #931, and #1498 remains the umbrella. Tracker comments or PR body identify #1595 and #958 closeout disposition.
narratives.NonGoals: No codeStructure schema changes, MAP generator changes, freshness gate changes, generated source header implementation, local index implementation, glossary convention implementation, or brownfield/spec reconstruction machinery.

items.title: Create and activate a closeout story vBRIEF for #1595/#958 reconciliation
Update stale PROJECT-DEFINITION/specification source text and rendered projections
Clarify documentation boundaries for generated headers, local indexes, brownfield extraction, and glossary work
Post tracker closeout comments and prepare PR closeout keywords for #1595 and #958
Run focused validation and complete the story lifecycle

references.title: Issue #1595: feat(codebase): generate codebase MAP from vBRIEF-owned codeStructure metadata
Issue #1498: RFC: Directive must dogfood vBRIEF-as-source-of-truth -- source code & headers are projections, not stores
Issue #958: feat: Agent-centric codebase conventions (file headers, repo map, glossary-driven comments)
Issue #1589: epic: spec reconstruction + drift guard - recover and keep project specs fresh
Issue #1618: RFC: Source-of-truth data vs materialized views vs local indexes
Issue #931: conventions: Define a stable pattern for documenting domain terminology in code comments
PR #1871: docs(codebase): propagate MAP projection guidance
PR #1839: feat(codebase): generate codebase MAP projection

expected_outputs: #1595 closeout state no longer says consumer propagation is pending
remaining work is routed to #1589, #1618, and #931 instead of the completed MAP series
